title: Enlistment of Philippine Overseas Shipping Enterprises and Enrollment of Philippine Flagships
content:
Section 1. Philippine overseas shipping enterprises may enlist their companies and enroll their ships trading overseas upon submission of the following documents: (a) Certificate of Accreditation by the Maritime Industry Authority (MARINA); (b) Certified true copy of certificate of vessel registry issued by MARINA; and (c) Post a surety bond in the amount of P200,000.00 from a reputable bonding company duly accredited by the Insurance Commission, with validity co-terminus with the validity of special registration.

Section 2. The Administration shall issue certificate of enlistment to the Philippine shipping company within twenty-four (24) hours from receipt of application provided all requirements are met.

Section 3. Enlistment validity shall be co-terminus with MARINA accreditation.

Section 4. For renewal, applicant shall submit application with (a) Copy of Certificate of Accreditation by MARINA; and (b) Renewed surety bond of P200,000.00. The Administration shall act within four (4) hours from receipt of application.
